summary: Clarify student-detail Reviews note visibility using the existing route-owned visibility contract.
selectedReason: Current repo evidence showed that functions/_lib/site-student-detail.ts already returned role-filtered comments plus a top-level visibility contract, but workspace.js still rendered generic note wording and raw status pills such as scoped, student_and_staff, or staff_only. Reusing that visibility contract in the student-detail Reviews tab and latest-feedback summary was the safest bounded slice because it improved privacy clarity without changing routes, permissions, or comment bodies.

candidates.decision: deferred: no exact current destination is proven for that follow-up row
deferred: hosted runtime is outside this local batch
deferred: backend queue rows are still absent
deferred: policy decision still comes before UI change
deferred: mutation and audit design still needed
not selected: useful, but lower current value than clarifying an active privacy boundary in student detail
deferred: broader multi-surface verification batch than this local slice
deferred: no supported add-note API path is proven in this lane yet
rejected: the current evidence counts still do not map to an exact backed destination

nextRecommended: Keep Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only until a precise scoped destination exists; if that remains blocked, inspect presentation schedule URL state using the current in-page filters.
doNotRepeat: Do not collapse student-detail Reviews back to generic Visible notes or raw scoped/staff_only labels while the route already provides note-visibility boundaries.
Do not expose staff-only or admin-only note text to mentor, student, or other scoped readers while clarifying student-detail note visibility.
